Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad

Class FlixelGamepad

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad.FlixelGamepad
public final class FlixelGamepad extends Object
Gamepad button codes copied from libGDX Input.Keys BUTTON_* values for backwards compatibility. Use for gamepad/controller button checks; use FlixelKey for keyboard.

  • Method Details

    • fromString

      public static int fromString(String name)
      Resolves a button name (as returned by Input.Keys.toString(int)) to a button code.
      Parameters:
      name - Button name from Input.Keys.toString(int).
      Returns:
      The button code, or -1 if not found.

    • toString

      public static String toString(int buttonCode)
      Returns a human-readable string for the given gamepad button code.
      Parameters:
      buttonCode - Button code from this class (same values as Input.Keys BUTTON_*).
      Returns:
      Human-readable button name, or null if unknown.
